city.name: Austin
city.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in Austin with OpenClaw. Perfect for Austin's thriving tech scene.
city.localFlavor: Austin's tech community is booming, and OpenClaw fits right in. Whether you're a startup founder on South Congress or a developer in the Domain, your AI assistant runs 24/7 on your own infrastructure.
